alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodacetamid (IAA; Merck, Germany)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM iodacetamid (IAA; Merck, Germany)
cleavage agent: for tryptic digestion, trypsin (Promega, USA) was added
collision energy: at a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 28
enrichment method: using the High-Select™ TiO2 Phosphopeptide Enrichment Kit (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA)
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive HF Hybrid Quadrupole Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: Mass spectral data were acquired in negative mode electrospray ionization
labeling: using a tandem mass tag (TMT)-based approach
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT; GE Healthcare)
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT; GE Healthcare)
